title.en: Ye Tian couldn't wait to ask.

content.en:
"Mingze Realm Lord, do you really have information about the Black Mist Multidimensional Body?"

Ye Tian looked at the Mingze Realm Lord at the peak of the second realm in front of him, and he was a little excited in his heart, but he didn't show it.

"Yes!" Ming Ze Realm Lord said: "But it is a crippled black mist multi-dimensional body, after all, a complete innate multi-dimensional Dao body, it is a inheritance that even the fifth realm wants to snatch, and the five thousand territory cannot exist." Moreover, even if it is a mutilated black fog multi-dimensional body, there are a lot of third realms that you want. "

"Tell me, where?"

Ye Tian couldn't wait to ask.

The Ming Ze Realm Lord didn't reveal it immediately, but looked at Ye Tian with a smile in his eyes, "This kind of news is worth a lot, Ye Tian Realm Lord, if you want to get it for free, then you can't do it." "

"Say, what's the price?"

Ye Tian also knew that it was impossible to get it for free, but as long as it wasn't too much, he was willing to give it. "Six-Six-Zero"

"100,000 super dimensional Dao coins, this price is not expensive!"

Ming Ze Realm Lord said.

"What, 100,000 super dimensional dao coins!" Ye Tian's pupils shrank, this price is too outrageous, you must know that in the 6,000th territory, many second realms can't take out 100,000 super dimensional dao coins at all, even if he has mixed more than a dozen super dimensional era time in the 5,000 territory and obtained a lot of treasures, he can still take out 100,000 super dimensional dao coins, but he is reluctant to take them out to buy a piece of intelligence!

"This is just information, and it may not be able to be obtained, so you can offer 100,000 super dimensional Dao coins, which is too expensive!"

Ye Tian refused.

"You can bargain!" the Mingze Realm Lord hurriedly said.

Subsequently, Ye Tian bargained with the master of Ming Ze Realm, and finally bought this piece of information at the price of 50,000 super dimensional dao coins.

I saw that after Ye Tian paid it, the Mingze Realm Lord immediately gave Ye Tian information.

After reading the information, Ye Tian frowned, "Mingze Realm Lord, it's too difficult to obtain the Black Mist Multidimensional Body Inheritance, I can't do it!"

"Ye Tian Realm Lord, the information is given to you, whether you can do it or not is your business, it has nothing to do with me!"

The master of Mingze Realm spread his hands, saying that everything had nothing to do with him.

And he relied on his own background, so he was naturally not afraid of offending Ye Tian.

Ye Tian didn't say anything and left directly.

And after Ye Tian left, the Mingze Realm Lord smiled, "Yes, I have cheated another second realm, and then continue to find some second realm transactions, there must be many second realms who are interested in the black mist multidimensional body." Hahaha, it's all a bunch of fools, if it's so easy to get, I'll go and get it myself, how can it be your turn. "

Swish!

The Mingze Realm Lord disappeared.

......

In fact, Ye Tian was not disappointed.

He was also very aware of the attraction of the Black Mist Multidimensional Body to the Second Realm and the Third Realm Transcendent Realm, but even so, he was still eager to obtain information about the Black Mist Multidimensional Body, after all, he was the second realm that was most eager to obtain the Black Mist Multidimensional Body, and only he could truly exert the value of the Black Mist Multidimensional Body.

After the information given by the master of Mingze Realm, a force was involved-the Red Wolf Family.

The Red Wolf Family is a powerful family with a powerhouse of the Fourth Realm, and it also has hundreds of Third Realms, this clan has the inheritance of the Black Mist Multidimensional Body, but this inheritance is relatively incomplete.

It is rumored that the Red Wolf Family also revealed an intelligence that they are willing to trade the Black Mist Multidimensional Inheritance, but they need to give treasures of the same value, otherwise it is impossible to obtain them.

The point is that the reputation of the Red Wolf Family is very good, if it has a deep background, it may still hope to obtain the Black Mist Multi-Dimensional Body, but the second realm with a real background will not cultivate the Black Mist Multi-Dimensional Body, after all, once it is cultivated, it means that there is no hope for the fourth realm!

And if the background is not deep, the Red Wolf Family is not afraid, even if it is traded to the Black Mist Multidimensional Inheritance, I am afraid that it will not be able to take it away, and it will be exterminated by the Red Wolf Family.

This is also the reason why the Ming Ze Realm Lord does not trade the Black Mist Multidimensional Body.

Under normal circumstances, no second realm dares to really trade, and there is not enough wealth to trade, and the Red Wolf Family does not look down on ordinary treasures.

"The Red Wolf Family, at present, I only know that they have it, and it is impossible to snatch the Black Mist Multidimensional Body from the Red Wolf Family, so I can only choose to trade. "

"Let's trade the identity of the Mingze Realm Lord, this guy is estimated to sell intelligence everywhere, don't you pit him?"

And what treasures to trade, he has already decided.

That is the multi-dimensional essence of the second realm, of course, it is the multi-dimensional essence of the second realm of the imitation of the multi-dimensional treasure bottle, even so, it is enough to attract the red wolf family, this is a treasure that can assist in improving the super-dimensional rules!

He believed that the Red Wolf Family would definitely trade, and even attract that Fourth Realm Being0 .........

So on this day, Ye Tian condensed the copy body of the Mingze Realm Lord, and then took away thirty drops of the Second Realm Multi-Dimensional Essence, maybe these multi-dimensional essences are not enough, but they are definitely enough as a deposit. []

Then, Ye Tian went to visit the Red Wolf Family.

The Red Wolf Family is located in the Red Wolf Realm of the Five Thousand Territory, this extradimensional realm is completely occupied by the Red Wolf Family, and almost all the creatures there are the bloodline of the Red Wolf Family, which shows how many of its creatures are, and the number of human races is not as good as the number of people in the Red Wolf Family, and the combat effectiveness is even more different.

......

The Red Wolf Family.

Ye Tian came to visit as the peak of the second realm, and it stands to reason that he could not get the attention of the Red Wolf Family, but he came to trade the Black Mist Multidimensional Body, and said that he had the treasures that the Red Wolf Family wanted, which naturally attracted a third realm existence from the Red Wolf Family.

Lord of the Wolf River Realm!

This third realm super-dimensional realm master soon appeared in front of Ye Tian, and the coercion of the third realm seemed to lock on Ye Tian.

But Ye Tian was not afraid at all.

"Meet the Lord of the Wolf River Realm!"

Ye Tian said respectfully.

"Mingze Realm Lord, you came to my Red Wolf Family and want to trade the Black Mist Multidimensional Inheritance, what can you come up with to trade?" asked the Wolf River Realm Lord.

If this Ming Ze Realm Lord can't come up with anything good, he will directly drive away the Ming 2.1 Ze Realm Lord, and even give some small punishments.

Wow!

Ye Tian directly took out a drop of the Second Realm Multidimensional Essence.

It was this small drop of the second-realm multi-dimensional essence that attracted the attention of the Lord of the Wolf River Realm.

"Multi-dimensional essence, you have a multi-dimensional vase!!!

He was shocked, the Ming Ze Realm Lord was so bold, with such treasures, he still dared to come to the Red Wolf Family to trade, could he find death?

"No, it's not a real multi-dimensional essence, it should be a multi-dimensional essence condensed from the imitation of the multi-dimensional treasure bottle, but it's also precious!" The Mingze Realm Lord's excitement decreased slightly, but he still stared at Ye Tian with burning eyes.

Even if it is an imitation of the Duowei Treasure Bottle, its value is still precious enough to make the general Fourth Realm feel excited, especially a force like the Red Wolf Family, it is even more necessary to have a treasure like the Duowei Treasure Bottle, the more the merrier.
